errors.name: Attitude Queue Empty
errors.description: Attitude Queue fell through, using older message.

errors.name: GPS Queue Empty
errors.description: GPS Queue fell through, using older message.

config_entries.name: time_offset_required
config_entries.description: If no RTC is available, a time offset will be calculated based on the payload's boot time and the mavlink SystemTime messages to attempt to tag images accurately.

config_entries.name: Exif.Photo.FNumber
config_entries.description: Ratio of focal length to aperture diameter

config_entries.name: Exif.Photo.ExposureProgram
config_entries.description: Does the camera follow a program to set exposure on the fly?

config_entries.name: Exif.Photo.SubSecTime
config_entries.description: Time remainder less than one second

config_entries.name: Exif.Photo.FocalPlaneResolutionUnit
config_entries.description: What unit the focal plane resolution values are using

states.name: INITIALIZING
states.description: Node has been started and has not finished assigning all publishers and subscribers.

states.name: INIT_WAITING_FOR_TIME_OFFSET
states.description: Node has been initialized and is waiting to receive a SystemTime message for accurate tagging.

states.name: STANDBY
states.description: Fully initialized, waiting for images to tag.
